item.title: Proclamation on National Angel Family Day, 2026
item.description: Presidential proclamation designates National Angel Family Day for 2026 to commemorate Americans who have died in crimes attributed to illegal border crossings and illicit drug trafficking. The proclamation acknowledges the grief of affected families, recognizes the Angel Families, and encourages remembrance as well as public-safety and preventive efforts related to crimes connected with illegal immigration and drug trafficking. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Nominations Sent to the Senate for United States Attorney for the District of Nevada and for Assistant Secretaries of State and the Interior
item.description: The White House announced nominations sent to the Senate for the following positions: George Kelesis to be United States Attorney for the District of Nevada for a four-year term, succeeding Jason M. Frierson; Catherine Dillon to be Assistant Secretary of State for Educational and Cultural Affairs, succeeding Lee Satterfield; and William Hague to be Assistant Secretary of the Interior. The announcement is listed on the White House site under the Nominations Sent to the Senate page. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Strengthening United States National Defense Through a Clean Coal Power Generation Fleet
item.description: This presidential action addresses the reliability and resilience of the United States electric grid to support military installations, operations, and defense-industrial production. It notes that prolonged disruption could threaten national defense and economic stability and expresses concern about dependence on intermittent energy sources. The document describes steps to prioritize secure energy generation, including a fleet of clean coal power plants, and to coordinate federal agency actions to safeguard critical energy infrastructure and ensure a stable energy supply for defense-related needs. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.
